title: Know the Risk Before You Route
text:
Know the Risk Before You Route
    A risk quantification API for fleet truck routes — real-time scores, contributing factors, and confidence intervals in a single call.
    
      Request Early Access
      Read the Docs →
    
  
  
    
      
        
        terminal
      
      
        $ llano compare \
        "Houston, TX" "Dallas, TX" \
        --waypoints "I-45 N" "US-290" "I-10 W"
         
        Scoring 3 routes...
         
        
            A
          via I-45 N         
          28/100 ● LOW  
          ✓ Go
        
        
            B
          via US-290 Brenham 
          61/100 ● MED  
          ⚠ Monitor
        
        
            C
          via I-10 W Columbus
          84/100 ● HIGH 
          ✕ Delay
        
         
          Recommendation: Route A
          Batch response: 312ms
         
        
      
    
  




  2.4M+Routes Scored
  
  48States Covered
  
  94%Prediction Accuracy
  
  <200msAvg Response Time




  HOW IT WORKS
  From Route to Risk in Milliseconds
  
    
      01
      Submit a Route
      Send origin, destination, vehicle class, and departure time to the API.
    
    →
    
      02
      Score Computed
      Our model ingests real-time weather, traffic, road quality, and historical incident data.
    
    →
    
      03
      Risk Returned
      Receive a 0–100 score, grade, confidence interval, and weighted contributing factors.
    
  




  ROUTE COMPARISON
  Score Before You Dispatch
  Evaluate multiple options in parallel. Route smarter, not harder.
  

    
      
        Route A
        LOW
      
      Houston → I-45 N (direct) → Dallas
      
        28
        
          
        
      
      
        Light traffic0.31
        Clear weather0.18
        Good visibility0.11
      
      ✓  Recommended
    

    
      
        Route B
        MEDIUM
      
      Houston → US-290 via Brenham → Dallas
      
        61
        
          
        
      
      
        Construction zones0.38
        Heavy traffic0.29
        Partial fog0.14
      
      ⚠  Monitor Conditions
    

    
      
        Route C
        HIGH
      
      Houston → I-10 W via Columbus → Dallas
      
        84
        
          
        
      
      
        Severe weather0.52
        Road hazards0.31
        High wind advisory0.22
      
      ✕  Delay Recommended
    

  




  CAPABILITIES
  Built for the Fleet Stack
  Everything your logistics platform needs to route smarter.
  
    
      🛣️
      Route Risk Scoring
      Composite risk scores for any truck route based on road conditions, traffic patterns, and historical incident data.
    
    
      ⚡
      Real-Time Conditions
      Live risk updates as conditions change — weather events, active construction, and traffic incidents reflected instantly.
    
    
      🔌
      REST API
      Clean RESTful endpoints designed for easy integration with TMS, dispatch, and fleet management platforms.
    
    
      📊
      Fleet Analytics
      Aggregate risk metrics across your entire fleet to surface patterns and benchmark route safety over time.
    
  




  API PREVIEW
  Simple to Call. Rich in Detail.
  One endpoint. A full risk picture.
  

    
      
        
        route_score.py
      
      import llano

client = llano.Client(api_key="sk_live_••••••••")

risk = client.routes.score(
    origin        = "Houston, TX",
    destination   = "El Paso, TX",
    vehicle_class = "class_8",
    depart_at     = "2026-03-15T06:00"
)

# Core score
print(risk.score)       # 72.4
print(risk.grade)       # "HIGH"
print(risk.confidence)  # 0.94

# Contributing factors
for f in risk.factors:
    print(f.type, f.weight)
# weather       0.38
# construction  0.24
# traffic       0.19
    

    
      
        
          
            
              
              
            
          
          
          
          72.4
          HIGH RISK
        
      
      
        
          Weather
          
          0.38
        
        
          Construction
          
          0.24
        
        
          Traffic
          
          0.19
        
      
      
        route_idrt_8xK2mNpQ
        confidence0.94
        latency148ms
      
    

  




  COVERAGE
  Built for the Roads That Matter
  From major interstates to rural corridors, Llano covers the routes your fleet depends on.
  








  Ready to de-risk your routes?
  Llano is in early access. Join the waitlist and be first to integrate.
